description: A Commercial Construction project for a three-story office building is open in ProjectLibre. The project's closeout and final inspection phase has been corrupted, with sequencing logic lost for the four inspection tasks, the 'Substantial completion date' milestone missing, and the punch list work incorrectly linked. Restore the correct closeout sequence following standard commercial construction practice, ensuring inspections follow regulatory order and the substantial completion milestone is correctly positioned after final cleanup. Ensure all downstream tasks reflect the corrected logic and save the project.

injected_errors: Removed all predecessor links from tasks 138 (elevator inspection), 139 (architect's inspection), 140 (building agency inspection), 141 (Fire Marshal's inspection)
Changed task 142 predecessor from 141 to 135 (punch list bypasses inspections)
